local_operator_task_smoke_contract.prompt: Return only a JSON object with task_kind=bounded_executor_task_smoke, status=acknowledged, canonical_mutation_attempted=false, and a short message. Do not inspect, edit, or create repository files.

local_operator_report_smoke_contract.prompt: Return only a JSON object matching the local_operator_executor_report contract. Use artifact_kind=local_operator_executor_report, schema_version=1, local_only=true, source_task_smoke_artifact=runs/local_operator_executor_task_smoke.json, producer_kind=coding_agent, producer_id=codex, authority_level=report_only, summary.status=valid_report, report_kind=analysis_report, curation_required=true, canonical_mutation_attempted=false, next_gap=run_bounded_executor_report_smoke, empty findings, source_evidence_refs containing runs/local_operator_executor_task_smoke.json, empty proposed_artifacts, and a closed privacy_boundary with all persisted flags false. Do not inspect, edit, or create repository files.

backend_id.description: Explicit executor backend selector carried with the request. Omitted or unsupported backends must not be inferred from out-of-band state.

provider_config_ref.description: Opaque runtime configuration reference. The gateway must not store provider secrets or raw BYOK values.
